justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's time preferences throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently offered alternatives (online meeting or checking further out) when in-branch appointments were unavailable, but it did not proactively suggest specific alternative dates.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made several redundant API calls by checking individual days within a week when the user requested a full week, and it also repeated the same apology multiple times.
justifications.customer_experience: The agent's repeated apologies and the lack of proactive alternative date suggestions made the conversation feel a bit tiring, even though the agent was polite and understood the requests.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent maintained context throughout the conversation and expanded its search as requested, but it did not proactively suggest specific alternative dates when the requested dates were unavailable.

overall_notes: The agent was very persistent in checking for in-branch availability as requested by the user, which is good, but it could have been more proactive in suggesting alternative dates or times within the in-branch medium, rather than just offering online meetings or 'further out'.
